title: Letter Road Driving
description: A playful tracing game where each letter becomes a road for a little car to drive.
learningGoals: Explore letter shapes through movement and direction
Practice curved-road letter forms with playful racing feedback
interactionModel: trace-path finger tracing with car emoji travelers on letter-shaped roads
feedbackModel: Successful drives get car-themed spoken cheers with sparkle/pop SFX; off-road tracing gets a gentle spoken steering nudge.

modes.title: Letter Roads
modes.skill: straight and angled uppercase letter shapes

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
